listings.title: BetterAt
listings.fullDescription:
BetterAt helps you make real progress on the things you care about — whether that's sail racing, training for a marathon, mastering a clinical skill, or building a business.

Instead of another tracker, BetterAt is built around how people actually improve:

• Interests — Add what you're working on and get a clear plan of next steps.
• Organizations — Join the clubs, schools, and programs that guide you, and follow their blueprints.
• Programs — Subscribe to curricula and training plans built by people who've done it before.
• People — Follow coaches, mentors, and peers moving in the same direction.

Every step captures the what, the how, the why, and the who — so your effort turns into visible progress and real evidence of what you can do. Plan your next steps, do the work, then review what you learned, with AI and your mentors helping you along the way.

Start with your first interest today and see what you can get better at.
listings.shortDescription: Learn by doing. Progress on your goals with programs, mentors, and peers.
